name: imp-coach-evening
prompt: An amateur football coach walking off the training pitch at golden hour, relaxed and satisfied, a gym bag over one shoulder, warm low sun flare behind him, seen from the side and slightly behind so the face is not recognizable.

name: imp-staff-touchline
prompt: Two or three football coaching staff members standing together on the touchline in soft daylight, calmly conferring over a clipboard, a blurred pitch behind them, composed and collaborative mood.

name: imp-coach-morning
prompt: A football coach standing confidently on a training ground in soft morning light, holding a tablet, composed upright posture, dew on the grass catching the light, framed from the side.

name: imp-team-huddle
prompt: An amateur football team in a tight pre-match huddle on the pitch in daytime, arms over each other's shoulders, viewed from slightly above, a feeling of unity and quiet focus, soft natural light, no single face emphasized.

name: imp-team-progress
prompt: Amateur football players training together in warm late-afternoon light, a sense of momentum and steady progress, soft golden backlight, controlled motion rather than chaos, composed cinematic framing.

name: imp-player-locker
prompt: A young football player sitting in a club locker room checking a phone in his hands, kit bag beside him, calm natural light from a window, framed on the hands, phone and kit, face not emphasized, hopeful and quiet mood.
